title: Olsztyn, Warmian-Masurian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Olsztyn, Warmian-Masurian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Olsztyn is a city in Warmian-Masurian with a population of 171,853. The gateway to the Masurian Lake District, a charming city with a Gothic castle, picturesque old town, and abundant outdoor recreation opportunities.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
